code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:5032/api/league';export const GetLeagueTable=async seasonId=>{const url=API_URL+"/";try{const response=await axios.get(url+seasonId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const PostLeagueTableResult=async leagueTableResult=>{const url=API_URL;try{const response=await axios.post(url,leagueTableResult);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};
